title: Bank of Japan keeps policy rate steady while raising inflation forecast on Iran war worries
summary_full: The decision to keep rates steady came in a split 6-3 vote, and was in line with Reuters-polled analysts' estimates.
summary_public: The decision to keep rates steady came in a split 6-3 vote, and was in line with Reuters-polled analysts' estimates.
